message:
✨ Add Demo Install Guide, card descriptions & missing CARD_TITLES (#249)

* ✨ Add DemoInstallGuide floating card for demo mode

When demo mode is active, shows a dismissible floating info card at the
bottom-left with 3 steps to install the console agent on the user's
system. Includes click-to-copy commands, links to docs and settings,
and an exit demo button. Dismiss state persists in localStorage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Add missing CARD_TITLES for all registered card types

Adds ~50 missing entries to CARD_TITLES to cover every card type in
CARD_COMPONENTS: events, trends, storage/network, GPU, compliance,
alerting, cost management, MCS, AI offline detection, weather, RSS,
utilities, and remaining game cards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add info icon with description tooltip to all card titles

Adds a CARD_DESCRIPTIONS map with short descriptions for ~95 card types
and renders a small info icon next to each card title. Hovering shows
a tooltip with the card's description. Also re-applies the
DemoInstallGuide integration in Layout.tsx and adds the Info icon
import from lucide-react.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
